compiled_state.description: During /dso:sprint → /dso:implementation-plan for story ce63-4a2a, the approach-decision-maker sub-agent dispatch used general-purpose agent instead of the named agent dso:approach-decision-maker (model: opus). The named agent is defined at plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md and must be dispatched via subagent_type: dso:approach-decision-maker per the Resolution Loop section of implementation-plan SKILL.md. The fallback path (read agent inline) was not followed either — instead a generic general-purpose Agent call was made with the approach-decision prompt written ad-hoc.
